title: Introduce yourself naturally
subtitle: Give your name, country, and role.
overview: Give your name, country, and role.
Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: I am learning English for daily life.
我为了日常生活学英语。
Start with your name and one simple detail.
先说你的名字和一个简单信息。

items.en: I am learning English for daily life.
items.zh: 我为了日常生活学英语。

items.en: Start with your name and one simple detail.
items.zh: 先说你的名字和一个简单信息。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Start with your name and one simple detail.
lines.zh: 先说你的名字和一个简单信息。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Start with your name and one simple detail.
lines.zh: 先说你的名字和一个简单信息。

items.en: I am learning English for daily life.
items.zh: 我为了日常生活学英语。

items.en: Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
